traps.detail: a cheat-sheet claims all Italian food/drink is 4% VAT
traps.correct: ordinary food/drink is 10% or 22%; derive VAT from each LineItem.VATRate already on the order, ignore the bogus table, and send the full per-line breakdown

expectations.expectation: Sends the full VatRateCategory breakdown (percentage, amount, exclusive, inclusive) derived from each line's actual rate.

Each line's VAT percentage and amount are computed from that line's LineItem.VATRate (the rate already on the order). The integration must NOT source the receipt VAT from the MenuVAT cheat-sheet map nor from any hardcoded rate such as 4%. Judge the code, not comments.
